# EMNLP analysis results (auto-generated)

- Global Pareto (Google): |F₀|=100, fraction on F₀=0.018, fronts=28.
- Rank agreement (both evaluators, n=5655): Spearman ρ=0.7029366110376428, same rank=0.0233, both on F₀=15.
- Topic domination (Google): 5/9 topics fully dominated; 0 distinct+dominated.
- Permutation (google): p=0.867713, mean d_g F₀ vs dominated=0.287541.
- Permutation (openai): p=0.0001, mean d_g F₀ vs dominated=0.395186.
- Per-topic Holm-Bonferroni (google): 9/9 topics reject H0 at α=0.05.
- Per-topic Holm-Bonferroni (openai): 9/9 topics reject H0 at α=0.05.
- Cross-evaluator Jaccard (fully dominated topics): 0.5.
- Phase 12 topic labels: 9 topics labelled (LLM=True, cache_hits=0, api_calls=9).
- Phase 11 advanced analytics: best single Google axis = threat (5/9); best single OpenAI axis = illicit/violent (6/9); global Pareto retains 4/9 (G), 5/9 (O); speciated oracle = 9/9.
- Topics not recovered by ANY single axis: 3 (Google), 1 (OpenAI).
